segments.speaker: 题目13/14
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. I heard you've been taking guitar lessons. sort of. I've been watching tutorial videos I found online. How is that going? Honestly, I feel like my progress has been uneven. The videos can be hard to follow at times. You know, the shop offers on one ons. My brother finished years ago and still raves about his teacher. I like that idea. Do you know who his teacher was? Let me go ask him now.
